_metadata.description: New words discovered by Filmot seed enrichment (88,581 subtitle records), manually filtered.
_metadata.data: pipeline/data/filmot_raw.jsonl (88,581 records from Filmot API, 21 queries)

methods.bootstrapping: 2531 conjunction matches, 28 accepted — ALL garbage (verbs, conjunctions, adverbs, slang: simt, știi, mulțumesc, sincer, sper, coaie, etc.). Zero usable words.
methods.distributional: 68 pattern matches, 13 words with freq>=2. Most already in seed (vinovăție, bucurie, frică, fericire) or not affective (situație, situații, energie).

filtering.bootstrapping_removed: All 28 words — none are affective states
distributional_removed: Already in seed: vinovatie, bucurie, frica, fericire
Not affective: situatie, situatii, energia, bine

_metadata.note: Low yield because filmot records are short subtitle snippets (~50 words each), so distributional patterns ('un sentiment de X') rarely fire. Bootstrapping finds many conjunction matches but the Y words are almost never affective states — YouTube speech is full of filler words after 'mă simt X și Y'.
